toolSpec.name: performSanctionsCheck
toolSpec.description: Executes comprehensive sanctions and PEP (Politically Exposed Person) screening for Ultimate Beneficial Owners (UBOs) of a business entity, verifying against multiple sanctions databases and PEP lists in compliance with regulatory requirements.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity being verified

ubo_list.description: List of Ultimate Beneficial Owners to be screened

name.description: Full legal name of the UBO

ownership.description: Percentage of ownership held by the UBO

toolSpec.name: getBusinessProfile
toolSpec.description: Retrieves and validates the complete business profile using a business identifier. This tool serves as the initial data collection step in the entity verification process, ensuring all required business information is available for subsequent verification steps.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity. Must be a valid business ID format as per system requirements.

toolSpec.name: getOwnershipData
toolSpec.description: Retrieves the Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO) information for a specified business entity, including ownership percentages and identification details. This tool supports regulatory compliance by identifying individuals who own or control 25% or more of the business entity.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity. Must be in the format 'biz_' followed by numbers.

toolSpec.name: verifyBankAccount
toolSpec.description: Validates bank account information for business entities as part of the verification process, checking account existence, ownership, and status with the specified banking institution

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity being verified

bank_account_number.description: Bank account number to be verified

banking_institution.description: Name of the banking institution where the account is held

bank_account_type.description: Type of bank account (e.g., Business, Checking, Savings)

toolSpec.name: getBankData
toolSpec.description: Retrieves and validates bank account information for a business entity as part of the verification process. This tool supports Section 5.5 of the SOP by providing essential banking details and verification status.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity. Must be in format 'biz_' followed by numbers.

toolSpec.name: calculateRiskScore
toolSpec.description: Calculates a comprehensive risk score for a business entity based on verification results, sanctions checks, and other compliance factors. Determines whether the case requires escalation based on the calculated risk score and other risk factors in alignment with regulatory requirements.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity being assessed

toolSpec.name: verifyUBO
toolSpec.description: Verifies Ultimate Beneficial Ownership information for a business entity, analyzing ownership structure, detecting shell company indicators, and assessing jurisdictional risks in compliance with regulatory requirements.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity being verified

ubo_list.description: List of Ultimate Beneficial Owners for the business entity

name.description: Full legal name of the beneficial owner

id.description: Unique identifier for the beneficial owner

ownership.description: Percentage of ownership held by the beneficial owner

toolSpec.name: verifyBusinessRegistration
toolSpec.description: Validates business registration and licensing status against government registries, checking registration status, license validity, and tax ID compliance as part of the entity verification process.

business_id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity

registration_number.description: Official business registration number issued by government authority

business_registration_state.description: Jurisdiction where the business is registered, including country for international entities

license_number.description: Business license number issued by regulatory authority
